tender_title: Procurement of an AI-Based Budget Estimation and Document Automation Platform
scope_of_work: Phase 1 – Discovery: Requirements gathering, stakeholder workshops, current process analysis; Deliverables: Business Requirements Document (BRD), Functional Specification, Solution Architecture
Phase 2 – AI Development: Develop AI components for OCR processing, document classification, information extraction, cost estimation suggestions, risk identification, natural language search
Phase 3 – System Integration: Integrate with Microsoft SharePoint, Microsoft Teams, Outlook, ERP system, SQL Server database
Phase 4 – Testing: Unit, integration, system, performance, security, and user acceptance testing; produce test plans, test cases, test results, defect reports, traceability matrix
Phase 5 – Deployment: Production deployment, user training, documentation, 30‑day hyper‑care support

functional: Process PDF files up to 500 pages
Provide confidence scores for AI recommendations

risks_or_missing_information: No budget or price ceiling disclosed in the tender document
Detailed data security and privacy requirements beyond encryption and authentication are not specified
The exact ERP system to be integrated is not identified
No explicit service level agreement (SLA) metrics for support beyond the 30‑day hyper‑care period
Weight percentages in the evaluation criteria sum to 100%, but the document lists 5 criteria; verification may be needed
summary: ABC Infrastructure Ltd. seeks a supplier to design, develop, integrate, test, and deploy an AI‑based platform that automates budget estimation and document generation for construction tenders. The solution must read various document formats, extract technical data, suggest cost estimates, flag missing information, and integrate with Microsoft 365 and the company’s ERP. The project is divided into five phases covering discovery, AI development, system integration, testing, and deployment, with a submission deadline of 10 July 2026 and a go‑live target of February 2027. Evaluation will be based on technical merit, experience, methodology, price, and sustainability.
